title: psychanthus comptus
side_effects: Psychanthus comptus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing vomiting, stomach pain, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds, which can cause electrolyte imbalances and dehydration. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to respiratory failure and even death. Some users may also experience skin irritation, allergic reactions, and eye problems due to contact with the plant's sap. Additionally, prolonged use of Psychanthus comptus can disrupt the body's natural balance, leading to anxiety, insomnia, and mood swings.
